name: Pro Life Update
subject: The Genesis Story Online Course Now on DVD
body:
I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z592d7jj9abt7b13fscs84ab2kbsuvutt6gv8cc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j60p35cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College’s popular online course, **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,”** is available on DVD.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5l56ji1cvt6bivp9g7alklhngmt8slnv2tlit18_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j60p35cdh2bs)In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education.

Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zumfe5fg5nhsumkfrgup1n2b6qb2vo0ecadl0ivo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j60p35cdh2bs)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding—even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.”
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Open and support classical K-12 charter schools through the College’s Barney Charter School Initiative.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z8qs6e8umsgl4ta3tpnbt1nkr24uhva8lf96p4uo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfajts18j1r78kstd2r0df34ecfqu8q19pp0fsng_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1c1gmco34clhm49fg)

name: Hoan Huynh
subject: Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Hoan
body:
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89231/images/Hoan_Christmas_Banner.png]Dear Peter,
I am reaching out to wish you a Merry Christmas and happy holidays!
Growing up, this was my favorite time of the year, when I get to enjoy holiday traditions with my loved ones and help spread joy in our community.
I've dedicated my life to serving others, especially around this time of year, because I know what it was like to be served by a beloved community as a former refugee, and I know how much of a difference it can make during the holiday season for working families.
And I hope you'll join me in doing your part to help your neighbors during this holiday season, and to also keep our community safe by taking precautions against COVID-19.
I am incredibly grateful for every American for making this holiday season a time for love, peace, and gratitude. From my family to yours, Merry Christmas and happy holidays. Please stay safe, and take care of each other.
With gratitude,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89231/images/Hoan%20Sig.JPG]Hoan Huynh
https://www.facebook.com/hoanforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/hoanforcongress] https://twitter.com/HoanDHuynh [https://twitter.com/HoanDHuynh] https://instagram.com/hoandhuynh/ [https://instagram.com/hoandhuynh/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/hoan-for-congress/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/hoan-for-congress/]

name: Glenn
subject: Wishing You a Merry Christmas!
body:
Friend,The holiday season is one of my favorite times of the year.Across our country, family and friends are reuniting to break bread, exchange gifts, and celebrate the end of one year and the beginning of another.

Not a day goes by where I am not honored and humbled to represent our great community in Congress. And, believe me when I say that _I've run out of fingers on which to count my many blessings._ Friends like you have given me the greatest gift I could ask for this Christmas: your continued support.From the bottom of my heart, I want to say _THANK YOU_ and wish you a very Merry Christmas, from my family to yours.Sincerely,Glenn

[](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ckdtdit-yddjllujiu-r/) [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ckdtdit-yddjllujiu-j/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-u-ckdtdit-yddjllujiu-t/)
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvvdh2dua95lmf6u4479nk2akf1ovp3fadegobk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5hm1oj3chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpamfigvrqfe2n5r1l0i394035rav7a01tssme08_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5hm1oj3chh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2giia7nprtia8710h7a68jfhaqvdqoqa840u7h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5hm1oj3chh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country.

Friend,

**I knew full well the price I’d have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn’t matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.

**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**

subject: U.S. Senate 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcgbhv6nluqaernari3tb0n9rpsrbpa9sep6ca2g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6dpkcup3cd74cirr4cbjctgrep366mo74sr1m9q7eo5l6uqe8obhcsq76tj1c3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmecr46upb2phmcspm9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm0pb2chge0p724no)

---

Folks,

**I wanted to touch base with my top supporters and let them know that I will be seeking re-election for the U.S. Senate in 2022.**

**_Watch Announcement Video Below_**
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjksbhhc9o53fkiiub2r4kl4m7hj8av0gbv2afho_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh68o70cjh2bs)
Representing the people of Louisiana and the United States has been such an amazing privilege and one of the most important things I’ve done in my life, just below being a father and a husband to my wife and son.

**_[I’m asking for your support to keep the radical left out of your pockets and as far away from your jobs as possible.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zodfelvf143cbcq3485pp9e3f3r15hojnpm2ch8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh68o70cjh2bs)_**

| [ENDORSE ME HERE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztmtdd9m0442b539okmhhvlumkaea6m1vaecnj90_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh68o70cjh2bs)
---

I’m looking forward to getting back on the campaign trail and meeting with my constituents about the issues that matter most.**What you hear in town isn’t what you see or hear up in Washington D.C., that’s for certain!**

I’m trying to bring common sense and idiot control to the U.S. Senate, but Chuck Schumer isn’t making that job easy. **But with your help, we might be able to get through to a few of these Democrats.**

**Chip in whatever you can. I can promise you it’ll go towards helping me Take Back the Senate and defend conservatives across the country.**

[$25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9fbgh3gs4va0d3qujcjv08h4mqgk89jfo2eifcg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh68o70cjh2bs)
---
[$50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9n3bh2em3jopupjoh6j1dr5jcpk0a2k6tcvi0ag_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh68o70cjh2bs)
---
[$100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbl8n6egnvvf8aj89sfre02cgbs6eijur0p6i998_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh68o70cjh2bs)
---
[$250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze5nr56ho6ot9drup8p8f52a3vhf8oelrv2fub9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh68o70cjh2bs)
---
[$500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z52tptn5o6781lt2l89j6037urv36bisef09beho_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh68o70cjh2bs)
---

Thank you and God Bless,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0eqpev41njbb0gvl3bjv5kffo719u7hegtiqv98_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh68o70cjh2bs)

**Peter, our country has seen more than 600 mass shootings and more than 42,000 gun-related deaths in 2021 alone; we’re now on track for this year to be the deadliest yet for gun violence.**
That’s not all – tragically, someone is killed with a gun in New York **_every 11 hours_**. And across the board, communities of color bear the brunt of harm from this devastating epidemic.
If you’re looking for someone to blame for these heart-wrenching statistics, look no further than the ultra-powerful gun lobby and the corrupt politicians they fund. As we fight tirelessly to put an end to these preventable deaths and ensure that fewer families next year will endure the pain of celebrating the holidays without a loved one, the gun lobby is doing everything they can to maintain the status quo.

I’ve spent my time as your attorney general fighting to hold the gun lobby and their powerful friends accountable, but I need the support of every last fearless fighter to win this battle.
[**That’s why I’m reaching out to you now with a quick survey about our country’s gun violence epidemic. I need 78 more voices before midnight tonight, so please Peter, let me know:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40030817/322549833/-546675118?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk259-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTMzMWMxYS01NDY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sao54iLHdt74ZhmHH-2nHSAOwD-_Ll6W031mhtOiGU0=&emci=9cb8640c-765f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2e331c1a-5466-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369504)

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6606%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Dk8XvMLDVWXsdDTD7giALg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68191%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=znTNO3dsS%2f00PL47CMUMEw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68192%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CwlnvlVh9eyq9nEKVqF2Ow&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68192%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CwlnvlVh9eyq9nEKVqF2Ow&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6606%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Dk8XvMLDVWXsdDTD7giALg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6606%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Dk8XvMLDVWXsdDTD7giALg&sysid=1)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8nlds0k3eiomqae1lrc6q3g3089rha983od6h28_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh6eoj4c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoa6fcdvu9hu2bc46mt5v7ea7k7lkuv45aguqo98_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh6eoj4c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6ouft2rcivgsc6ml1gbb2kt3k3e0l1cl6slcch8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clh6eoj4c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8239%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=oTwkVgTiEqY3IJq4xZuvrg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10402%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2P8Ej8JCl2227LgVDx24eA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10403%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PIGIJaQYtXEqr2kHot%2f88g&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10403%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PIGIJaQYtXEqr2kHot%2f88g&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Hello,
Donald Trump came back to Iowa to endorse my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley, and that’s a scary thing for democracy. Let me explain why.
After Donald Trump was elected in 2016, I retired from the U.S. Navy after nearly 40 years. I knew what Donald Trump was, and I was not going to be used as a prop for the political purposes of an irrational demagogue. **Never did I imagine, though, that we would witness what happened on January 6th.**
Thankfully, our democracy prevailed that day, but I fear things may be in a more dangerously precarious position than ever before. Donald Trump’s minions are already back in Iowa gearing up for a comeback in 2024. Trump is once again using division to consolidate support from lapdog-ishly weak-willed Republicans like my opponent Chuck Grassley.
**If Republicans take back the House and the Senate in 2022, what stops them from overturning the election results in 2024 like they nearly succeeded at doing in 2020?** The only assurance we can bank on is a Senate led by tough, seasoned, stalwart Democrats – ready to defend our democracy against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
Senate control hinges on my race here in Iowa. But we’re facing our first end-of-quarter FEC deadline on December 31st, and right now we’re still $31,405 short of our $100,000 goal and what we need to win.
**If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect not only our Democratic majority in the Senate but also our very democracy, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**

My answer is ZERO... When I get elected to Congress, I am going to push back against Nancy Pelosi and her puppets. I REFUSE to stand back while Anthony Fauci dictates down to us how we should live our lives.

body:
| | |
---
Team – concerned Democrats have emailed you about Maggie Hassan’s race in New Hampshire: “Senate control hinges on New Hampshire, where Maggie Hassan is defending a seat she won by just 1,017 votes.”
_-Kirsten Gillibrand_ “Our Democratic Senate majority is in serious jeopardy, and it's looking like Maggie's race could be the deciding factor.”
_-Jeanne Shaheen_ | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40037984/322578095/-913685435?refcode=e20211226_validators&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjNjNzdmNC02MzY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WAXegQ6ykEUDZcYGp22HwlHymKLB8D9puu0bpnB1NwY=)

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40038349/322580901/-256176432?amount=3&refcode=UD_20211226_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4NGEyZDI5LTY1NjYtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fZv-2O9E6er-Il7-Jx5RjB0Wtt7RcD0pV496o_07CkU=) Peter,

This is not the news I was hoping for. Senator Joe Manchin just announced he will not vote for the Build Back Better Act, killing any hope for passage of this historic bill.

The Build Back Better Act is a lifeline for working families across the country. It will lower prescription drug costs and cap insulin at $35. It will extend the child tax credit, cutting taxes for those who need it and putting money directly in the pockets of parents. And it will ensure corporations and the wealthiest 1% start paying their fair share.

It’s clear a 50-50 tie in the Senate is not good enough. If we want to make progress on the issues that matter, we can’t let a single Senator stand in our way. And Ohio is the best chance we’ve got to expand our majority.

[**Please, donate $3 or more to help us flip Ohio blue. Political analysts have rated us as one of the most winnable races for Democrats, but only if we have your grassroots support. **** Team, Right now, we’re in the final countdown before our campaign’s biggest fundraising deadline to date. [**Before I ask if you can pitch in a grassroots contribution to help reach our end-of-year goal before Friday at midnight**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40038416/322581334/282571568?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211226EOY1_GV_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTM1Njg3NS02NTY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wXGLmHx7yIyAX4P_eUNEGzGtEfLLHPigciSKszisWTM=), I hope you’ll let me explain what’s at stake. I’m running for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District to ensure that every child and family has a chance to succeed. I’m running to bring real results to New Mexico. As a first-generation American, I was given the opportunity to make a difference in my community, and that’s what I intend to continue doing in the U.S. House. Too many of our families lack the support and investment that they deserve to live dignified and meaningful lives. Every New Mexican deserves an opportunity to make an honest living, have access to high-quality healthcare, and stay in the community that they love. That’s not happening today, and unfortunately, Rep. Yvette Herrell is not bringing home the results that we need. She’s too busy playing partisan politics in Washington, D.C., putting our health at risk, supporting the far right-wing insurrectionist movement, and pushing to take away our right to vote. **We need change, and we need it next November. In order to get there, we need to end this year strong and kick off 2022 with the resources to get on the ballot and WIN.** [**So, I’m asking personally: can you chip in your first $5 donation before Thursday’s last FEC deadline of 2021 to help us flip this crucial House seat and give NM-02 real leadership in 2022?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40038417/322581336/282571568?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211226EOY1_GV_full_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTM1Njg3NS02NTY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wXGLmHx7yIyAX4P_eUNEGzGtEfLLHPigciSKszisWTM=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = ** Team, Right now, we’re in the final countdown before our campaign’s biggest fundraising deadline to date. =, I hope you’ll let me explain what’s at stake. I’m running for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District to ensure that every child and family has a chance to succeed. I’m running to bring real results to New Mexico. As a first-generation American, I was given the opportunity to make a difference in my community, and that’s what I intend to continue doing in the U.S. House. Too many of our families lack the support and investment that they deserve to live dignified and meaningful lives. Every New Mexican deserves an opportunity to make an honest living, have access to high-quality healthcare, and stay in the community that they love. That’s not happening today, and unfortunately, Rep. Yvette Herrell is not bringing home the results that we need. She’s too busy playing partisan politics in Washington, D.C., putting our health at risk, supporting the far right-wing insurrectionist movement, and pushing to take away our right to vote. We need change, and we need it next November. In order to get there, we need to end this year strong and kick off 2022 with the resources to get on the ballot and WIN.** = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you so much for anything you can give, Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of southern New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
I know Val Demings has what it takes to win, but a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind
| | |
---
**I'm losing sleep over this, friend! **
**FIRST,** polls showed Val Demings neck and neck with Marco Rubio, and CNN called this seat one of the MOST likely to flip.
**BUT THEN, **Republicans flipped Virginia red, proving they have a real chance to win major battleground states in 2022.
**NOW,** Val Demings needs OUR help to surge ahead – because Senate control WILL come down to what happens in Florida!
**That's why ****I committed to helping Val Demings raise $100,000 before her upcoming fundraising deadline, and I'm asking for your help:**** [Will you donate $5 or more now to elect Val Demings and defend Democrats' Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40038658/322582806/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1727-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQyZjY5MS02NTY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_pMCi3DzkueYR6yxSuKjViQ57BVcL2IOeviwrZ3GDEE=)**
Florida's last Senate race was decided by only 10,033 votes, and trust me when I say that grassroots fundraising can truly make or break a race that close. Meanwhile, Marco Rubio's got the FULL support AND financial backing of Trump, McConnell and their GOP megadonors.
I know Val Demings has what it takes to win, **but a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be****, so I'm counting on you to donate tonight****:**

body:

Dear Peter,
In case you have not seen the new maps the GOP Supermajority is proposing – Republicans are trying to illegally maintain their power and control by drawing Democrats out of their districts across the state.
In an attempt to repeat what happened after the 2010 U.S. census, they’ve pitted Democrat incumbents against each other in eight different districts. Before the 2010 census, we had 49 Democrats in the House. **Today, we only have 26 and Republicans are trying to steal 8 more from the people. **
The House Democratic Caucus is working diligently to ensure what happened last redistricting does not happen again.
[But we need your help. Can you chip in today to help us stop unfair and unconstitutional redistricting?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40039194/322585668/496136080?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjM5YTA3YS02NzY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-zUiVL2Gn5O3pwgcgfWlIqoQr4w_eUSLB00THi2Qd8=)
We the people means we choose who is elected, not elected officials choosing their voters.
Thank you,
Chairman Vincent Dixie
State Representative, District 54
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus Chairman

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmdcsfj8hcvgatplhpu1155rgni0gj5e80fl0o08_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clj62ob3c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3j6gq30shn6ipbdc5mc9geasdlehr74d3h6por1c3ks4qreob46lh74p1meljrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3appjcgo75d366lgbbcb7m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb8kd0fdeqvt3iicpg3joe6ikd29cevatq511jog_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clj62ob3c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8n134bpkugf7mvvmef26j50hk0k71pckga1q2k8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clj62ob3c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3otg5q09ee7hhm7c5ooaecmlr6shmkvttmb6q2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clj62ob3c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2z8dgeulav7vk76p12k88oqnaoh2spaq31shtjtp8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za59461suv3jgve8rgo6rmhqnsicjtemhbl7j17g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clj62ob3c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zql31qr0tpfoajdvhaq98v7far7vfp3tva1om6c0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clj69o76chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu70v0hdg3egvme68v01hpilobtl8h45kia8be10_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clj69o76chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze4cfb109m8334s6c3rer6qgpqkptnmnfm1rjdmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clj69o76chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z9bntus84u3oc3icftnd9la7jllo8fefr3fh4seo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zaukim5phuc56bd70a3qjg93hh0c236i61keu0f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clj69o76chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

**TX-37 represents an incredible opportunity to Texans.**

It's Austin's first chance to send a Democrat to Congress in decades. And not just any Democrat, but a champion for the working class and understands technologies that will deliver solutions for the next generation.

It's also an opportunity for us to turn out voters at historic levels. If we do that, we'll be able to flip Texas blue from the top of the ticket on down. With Beto O'Rourke running for governor, our race is the key to breaking the GOP's ironclad grip on Texas and helping close the 215,000 gap by getting Democrats in the bluest city in Texas to the polls.

95% of the population growth in Texas in the last decade was Hispanic, Black and Asian Americans. We need leadership that represents the diverse community that Austin has become

Friday marks our first FEC end-of-quarter deadline since we officially announced our campaign in Texas' new Democratic-leaning 37th Congressional District. = | = TX-37 represents an incredible opportunity to Texans. It's Austin's first chance to send a Democrat to Congress in decades. And not just any Democrat, but a champion for the working class and understands technologies that will deliver solutions for the next generation. It's also an opportunity for us to turn out voters at historic levels. If we do that, we'll be able to flip Texas blue from the top of the ticket on down. With Beto O'Rourke running for governor, our race is the key to breaking the GOP's ironclad grip on Texas and helping close the 215,000 gap by getting Democrats in the bluest city in Texas to the polls. 95% of the population growth in Texas in the last decade was Hispanic, Black and Asian Americans. It’s going to take building the biggest coalition of working folks that Pennsylvania has ever seen
#

Here's the deal, folks –
We have exactly five days before we are legally required to close the books on this quarter and publicly report our fundraising numbers.
Our public report must show that our big bold coalition to elect Malcolm has the momentum to win, but honestly, donations have slowed down, and we're tracking behind our goal of 5,000 donations.
**So, we’ve got two options:**
* Either more people need to pitch in before our deadline on Friday

* Or, we need folks to contribute just a little bit more than usual

**[Most first-time contributors donate about $5. Will you please make a contribution of $10 to help us get back on track before midnight? We cannot win this race if we miss this goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40042206/322601251/-360183459?refcode2=75165d88-7766-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211226-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTE2NWQ4OC03NzY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVVkGbMEnk8GDc1L4q5lQqGd7PxXG7oLf7Nly3lM2o8=)**

Malcolm represents working Pennsylvanians. He grew up in the projects in North Philly and knows what it’s like to face an eviction notice because minimum wage work doesn’t pay the bills.
He’ll fight for working families in the Senate because he’s experienced the pain that Washington’s failures have inflicted on Pennsylvania firsthand.
But first, we have to win this race — and it’s going to take building the biggest coalition of working folks that Pennsylvania has ever seen to do it.
So are you in? This campaign is powered by lots and lots of folks chipping in a few dollars at a time, so we’re counting on grassroots donations from emails like this one to keep up our momentum.

name: Mark Takano
subject: I was outed as gay by my Republican opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
In the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40042296/322601644/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjJhZWJiNi03ODY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GCRsjK73IWdP2M03tRk1oNaxUhNmxp43Kl5fAomjvc=)
---
Peter,

I want to be vulnerable with you for a moment and share my personal painful story about my coming out experience.

**In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay with bigoted and homophobic ads to our district. I hadn’t even come out publicly yet!**

For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed.

**I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn’t until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012.**

Peter, I’m so glad that in the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up. Now, I can fight for LGBTQ+ equality and dignity in our nation’s capital and stand up for other marginalized Americans.

But sadly, since 2012, Republican bigotry and vitriol has not slowed down. Trump’s MAGA Republicans have spread hatred and divisiveness around the world while Republican state legislatures are passing anti-LGBTQ+ legislation as fast as they can. [**Peter, in 1994 when I was attacked for my identity, I lost my race because I didn’t have good people like you by my side. But now I do -- and I’m hoping that I can count on you to chip in $3 to help me fight back against hateful Republicans and stop their anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. Will you help me reach my $20,000 End of Year goal? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40042297/322601645/232128462?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20211226_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjJhZWJiNi03ODY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GCRsjK73IWdP2M03tRk1oNaxUhNmxp43Kl5fAomjvc=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40042303/322601651/232128462?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20211226_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjJhZWJiNi03ODY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GCRsjK73IWdP2M03tRk1oNaxUhNmxp43Kl5fAomjvc=)

Thank you so much -- I’m so glad to have your support.

clean_body: In the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up. | = Peter, I want to be vulnerable with you for a moment and share my personal painful story about my coming out experience. In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay with bigoted and homophobic ads to our district. I hadn’t even come out publicly yet! For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed. I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn’t until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012. Peter, I’m so glad that in the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up. Now, I can fight for LGBTQ+ equality and dignity in our nation’s capital and stand up for other marginalized Americans. But sadly, since 2012, Republican bigotry and vitriol has not slowed down. Trump’s MAGA Republicans have spread hatred and divisiveness around the world while Republican state legislatures are passing anti-LGBTQ+ legislation as fast as they can. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you so much -- I’m so glad to have your support. ** Hey team, I wanted to make sure that you saw this message from earlier this week. **Noted anti-vax conspiracy theorist Marjorie Taylor Greene OWNS STOCKS in three separate vaccine manufacturers.** It’s further proof that all she cares about is getting her name in the headlines, and she’s willing to say whatever it takes - even if it means harming thousands of people. [**Our district, our state, and our country deserve better than this. Click here to rush a donation to my campaign for Congress to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40042378/322602084/-825069922?refcode=20211226_mf_stocksFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjU2Y2Q4OC03YTY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AftSWbEI5BFa5WwbDmGpACJT0GdoWYQ-Aq9cM_Uv5L0=) \----**Begin forwarded message** \----
From: Stop QAnon <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Hypocrisy Alert: Marjorie Taylor Greene owns stocks in three vaccine manufacturers! Friends, it’s just come to light that dangerous anti-vaxx advocate Marjorie Taylor Greene owns stocks in three different vaccine manufacturers. **Since Day One, Marjorie Taylor Greene has been a hypocrite who will say ANYTHING to get her name in the headlines.** **Her deranged conspiracy theories around COVID-19, the vaccine, and Dr. Fauci have done untold damage across the country -- and now we know she was secretly playing both sides of the coin. name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuhig5hdn46u97lr1v3m6c9663d28a1msopj9d1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clgmcob6chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqdnoh50d762qhoslt4o707qo1vofo6eead9ed80_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clgmcob6chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze4sami287tbl5sn5m8b04n173613op3mfh6aee0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0clgmcob6chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfu25j94gsd9og24clu3crfnkib91umk72ebrmr0_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zavsjdglepjd269ijn3f0fnn2u8b4igt2jointfo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1c1im2pj1cpi649fg)

name: Ret. Navy Fighter Pilot Jake Ellzey
subject: Goodbye, America!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
The end of this great country...
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?35jaj--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

Hi, Fellow Conservative,
It’s Jake Ellzey, Ret. Navy Fighter Pilot and Conservative candidate running in TX-06.
I’ll be straightforward, I’m sick to my stomach. I’ve been raising money to defeat Pelosi and the D.C. Elites for months now, but the way it's looking, I don’t think I’ll reach my fundraising goal...
IT GETS WORSE: Pelosi, Beto, and their desperate, wealthy donors, have raised more than **$300 MILLION** and counting to pummel American Patriots into the ground.
Wide-open borders, late-term abortions, higher taxes on EVERYTHING, and PERMANENT COVID mandates -- _**that’s how they plan to destroy America.**_
With just 24 hours until the end of my CRITICAL deadline, I am only $126 short.
[**Fellow Conservative, can I count on you to chip in to help me reach this goal by the deadline?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35jaj-1qqg6-4qqlpo0/)
Beto and Pelosi are increasing their cash advantage as we speak, and we NEED to catch up ASAP!
[**Emergency Deadline Donation of $5**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35jaj-1qqg7-4qqlpo1/)

\- Jake

name: Marisa Wood
subject: Enclosed: McCarthy’s 2021 in review
body:
It's hard to keep track of everything Kevin McCarthy has done this year, but let's start with the basics. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40043169/322606821/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjE3MzcxZC04MDY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C97Cdzy31y8TAciI62br-OanvebHGrakmFQEY2J_q0Y=)
Friend,

Just before the holiday, I like to have my kiddos reflect on the past year and their goals for the new year. With our final FEC end-of-quarter deadline on Friday, I thought it would be valuable for us to do that too.

**It's hard to keep track of everything Kevin McCarthy has done this year, but here’s a start:** \- He **removed Liz Cheney** from GOP leadership for calling out Trump's "Big Lie"
\- He **blocked the investigation** into the Jan. 6th insurrection
\- He **dismissed US Capitol Police** who spoke the truth about what happened
\- He **threatened companies** that complied with the Jan. 6th investigation
\- He **joked about hitting Nancy Pelosi** with the Speaker's gavel
\- He tried _(and failed!)_ to **block COVID-19 relief** and the **child tax credit**
\- _And so much more..._ **McCarthy has acted with impunity for far too long.** Our campaign is holding him accountable -- right now in the district and at the ballot box next November. But if we’re going to do this, we need to meet the mark on every fundraising goal, especially our final FEC end-of-quarter goal of the year:

**[We need to raise $6,717 before midnight to keep pace and hit our goal. Will you chip in $3 to help me DEFEAT GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy? Everything you give will help us reach more Democrats and undecided voters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40043171/322606823/-787496292?refcode=em-122621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjE3MzcxZC04MDY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C97Cdzy31y8TAciI62br-OanvebHGrakmFQEY2J_q0Y=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40043173/322606825/-787496292?refcode=em-122621-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjE3MzcxZC04MDY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C97Cdzy31y8TAciI62br-OanvebHGrakmFQEY2J_q0Y=)

clean_body: It's hard to keep track of everything Kevin McCarthy has done this year, but let's start with the basics. | = Friend, Just before the holiday, I like to have my kiddos reflect on the past year and their goals for the new year. With our final FEC end-of-quarter deadline on Friday, I thought it would be valuable for us to do that too. It's hard to keep track of everything Kevin McCarthy has done this year, but here’s a start: \- He removed Liz Cheney from GOP leadership for calling out Trump's "Big Lie" \- He blocked the investigation into the Jan. 6th insurrection \- He dismissed US Capitol Police who spoke the truth about what happened \- He threatened companies that complied with the Jan. 6th investigation \- He joked about hitting Nancy Pelosi with the Speaker's gavel \- He tried (and failed!) to block COVID-19 relief and the child tax credit \- And so much more... McCarthy has acted with impunity for far too long. Our campaign is holding him accountable -- right now in the district and at the ballot box next November. But if we’re going to do this, we need to meet the mark on every fundraising goal, especially our final FEC end-of-quarter goal of the year: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It's my goal for the Central Valley to have new representation in the new year. I know it's possible, but only if we all work together. Marisa = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. # Fatal blow to Build Back Better
---
"I can't get there."
On Sunday, Sen. Joe Manchin said he would not support the Democrat insanity of the "Build Back Better" bill. I applaud the senator for acting on what is best for America rather than bowing to party ideology.
The Build Back Better bill would be like throwing gasoline on the fire of inflation already burning in our nation. Additionally, the social spending in this bill would impact an already weakened work force and crush small businesses trying to reach full employment. But the fight isn't over. Watch for this bill to be repurposed next year as Democrats look to socialize America.
Next up, Democrats will attempt to cram through voting rights legislation before the end of the year--if passed, it will fundamentally change elections in our nation, and virtually guarantee one-party rule remains in Washington.
Among a litany of changes, the Freedom to Vote Act expands voter registration (in the way of automatic and same-day registration) and voting access (vote-by-mail and early voting). It also limits removing voters from voter rolls. The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021 is proposed legislation that would restore and strengthen parts of the Voting Rights Act of 1965, certain portions of which were struck down by two United States Supreme Court decisions.
These two pieces of legislation essentially hijack our elections, giving power to the federal government through "preclearance" checks by the states, and twists laws to make it virtually impossible for states to defend their laws. It's a Washington power grab designed to keep Democrats in power.
We need more people in Washington to stand up for what's right and who put country before party. Help me get to Washington to stop the takeover by the radical left. Please join our cause by donating today.

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Reminder: Joe Biden is a failure
body:
Radical Left policies are a disaster
---
| | | | | | Volume 21 | December 22, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
Joe Biden and the Washington elite are failing America--and the numbers show it.

In a poll released last week, more than one in two voters disapprove of Biden's handling of the economy, taxes, and crime. Simply put, the Biden administration with their Radical Left policies has been a disaster on all fronts.

The Fox Business poll released Dec. 16 shows that 59% of those polled disapprove of Biden's handling of the economy, while 57% dislike his position on taxes, and 56% think he has mishandled crime. And we are only one year into his administration. Here are some other signs of failure:

* Government spending: 36% approve; 59% disapprove
* Immigration: 36% approve; 59% disapprove
* How things are going in the country: 35% satisfied; 65% not satisfied

Biden and his supporters in the Senate and in Congress are in trouble with the American people and they know it. I will bring solutions to Washington--lower taxes, secure borders, restraints on spending and judicious assistance for our states and local governments to implement judicial reform and refund the police.

Enough is enough. We need new leadership comprised of those who love this country and want to serve it. Help me get our government back on track, and in its rightful, limited place, by donating today.

|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
Last week I appeared on the Mandy Connell and Peter Boyles shows, spoke at the Liberty First meeting in Colorado Springs, then celebrated the holidays with my campaign staff in downtown Denver.
This week I will be talking with voters and then taking time with my family to enjoy Christmas.

I will stay in touch with you through these emails as we welcome in the New Year. I am deeply grateful for your kind support and contributions. I hope you have a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!

I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail!
| |
---

Falling short of our $10,000 goal could make or break our campaign (and our best chance to have real climate change leadership in Congress). According to this new report, scientists are predicting the Thwaites ice shelf in Antarctica will collapse within the next three to five years, unleashing a river of ice that could dramatically raise sea levels across the planet. Desperate times call for desperate measures; that’s why as a scientist who studied how to fight the climate crisis, I am running for Congress to be the voice we direly need. = It’s no secret that the Earth is getting warmer, sea levels are rising, and wildfires grow rampant, but politicians are putting fossil fuels lobbyists above the future of our planet. And GOP-kooks are making matters even worse with their anti-science propaganda. I don’t know about you, but I am sick and tired of it. Now is our best and only chance to fight back and get sht done. name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: 5 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
With the Build Back Better Act on the line in the Senate and big electoral fights looming in 2022, we can’t afford to miss our December 31 deadline goal.
#
Peter,
There are only 5 days left in 2021, and we are falling short of reaching an important $322,500 goal. We expected fundraising to slow down around the holidays. But it’s a big issue when small-dollar contributions from emails like the one you’re reading right now make up a huge chunk of our overall fundraising.
**With the Build Back Better Act on the line in the Senate and big electoral fights looming in 2022, we can’t afford to miss our December 31 deadline goal.**
[**Can you chip in $3 or any amount right now so we can catch up on our fundraising and continue pushing for our progressive priorities in the new year?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9082?refcode=em20211226-903&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=903%2E420207%2EW74JIZ)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9082?refcode=em20211226-903&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=903%2E420207%2EW74JIZ)**
**The challenges we face won’t disappear when the clock strikes midnight on New Year's Eve.** Working people will still be relying on Congress to deliver real, tangible change — like lowering prescription drug costs, extending the monthly Child Tax Credit, passing paid leave, guaranteeing affordable child care, and so much more that will make a real difference for families and communities across America.
If we get to work now, 2022 can be the most monumental year of progressive change and victories yet. But to make that happen, we need to catch up — and fast. [**Make a contribution of $3 or anything you can afford to help reach our final goal of the year before the mandatory federal deadline. Doing so will help us be prepared to keep up these important fights in the new year.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9082?refcode=em20211226-903&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=903%2E420207%2EW74JIZ)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211226-903-footer&t=22&refcode2=903_420207_W74JIZ&akid=903%2E420207%2EW74JIZ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=903%2E420207%2EW74JIZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=903%2E420207%2EW74JIZ)

You have ZERO regard for Floridians -- including our children, teachers, and nurses!

_It’s disgusting._

**Floridians relied on you to be their leader -- and you failed them MISERABLY.**

I can’t wait for the day when you leave the Governor’s Mansion -- and today, we’re already starting the fight to retire you.

subject: supporting my friend Val Demings
