body:
Val Demings can only win if we all step up to help.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40044636/322616267/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1397-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGJkMzM3ZC04ZjY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fdnWml90GWZ7eDHl6CFhDeEGQFulxBJyjtCDiEZUJvc=)
Hi, friend – it's Adam Schiff, I value your time so I’ll cut right to the chase: If there is anyone who can defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Senate majority, it’s Val Demings.
I've worked alongside Val for years. She's brilliant. She’s tough. She’s exactly the kind of leader we desperately need in the Senate. And that Floridians desperately need fighting for them. She's got a really good shot at beating Rubio and flipping this Senate seat blue – **but she cannot do it alone. She needs supporters like you and me by her side.**
**That's why I'm putting my full support behind her Senate campaign – and I hope you’ll join me in supporting Val by pitching in today.**
**[_Will you donate $5, or whatever you can spare, to help Val Demings flip Florida blue? Your contribution will go directly to her grassroots campaign to unseat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic Senate majority._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40044637/322616268/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1397-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGJkMzM3ZC04ZjY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fdnWml90GWZ7eDHl6CFhDeEGQFulxBJyjtCDiEZUJvc=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40044638/322616269/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1397-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGJkMzM3ZC04ZjY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fdnWml90GWZ7eDHl6CFhDeEGQFulxBJyjtCDiEZUJvc=)
---
**Val Demings is the perfect person for the job.** She's spent her whole life serving the people of Florida, first as a social worker, and then as Orlando's chief of police (the first woman to hold that position, may I add). While serving in the House, she's never tired of doing what's right – from advocating for affordable health care, to our important work together during the first impeachment trial of the most dangerous president we’ve ever seen. There's no question that her tenacious spirit belongs in the Senate.
But our Senate majority is razor-thin at 50-50, and experts have already predicted that Senate control could all come down to who wins in Florida. **If Val Demings loses, Mitch McConnell could flip the Senate – so this is a campaign every Democrat needs to help. Because we can’t let McConnell take over. We just can’t.**
I wish I could say this will be an easy race, but the GOP is already doing whatever it takes to defend Rubio and attack Val: National Republicans just spent $10 million on on-the-ground organizers to stop Val and any other Democrat from winning in Florida ever again.
The last Senate race in Florida was decided by a tiny margin, just 0.12 percent, that’s unheard of and extremely tight. Recent polls show this race is already in the margin of error. So what we do right now will make all the difference. **That's why Val Demings needs your help to expand her grassroots campaign and reach every Floridian voter.**
**[_Please, friend, will you donate $5 before the End of the Quarter to help Val Demings beat Marco Rubio? Every dollar you can spare now can help Democrats defend our majority in the Senate and send Val to the Senate._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40044639/322616270/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1397-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGJkMzM3ZC04ZjY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fdnWml90GWZ7eDHl6CFhDeEGQFulxBJyjtCDiEZUJvc=)**

clean_body: Val Demings can only win if we all step up to help. | | | = Hi, friend – it's Adam Schiff, I value your time so I’ll cut right to the chase: If there is anyone who can defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Senate majority, it’s Val Demings. I've worked alongside Val for years. She's brilliant. She’s tough. She’s exactly the kind of leader we desperately need in the Senate. And that Floridians desperately need fighting for them. She's got a really good shot at beating Rubio and flipping this Senate seat blue – but she cannot do it alone. She needs supporters like you and me by her side. That's why I'm putting my full support behind her Senate campaign – and I hope you’ll join me in supporting Val by pitching in today. = | | = Val Demings is the perfect person for the job. She's spent her whole life serving the people of Florida, first as a social worker, and then as Orlando's chief of police (the first woman to hold that position, may I add). While serving in the House, she's never tired of doing what's right – from advocating for affordable health care, to our important work together during the first impeachment trial of the most dangerous president we’ve ever seen. There's no question that her tenacious spirit belongs in the Senate. But our Senate majority is razor-thin at 50-50, and experts have already predicted that Senate control could all come down to who wins in Florida. If Val Demings loses, Mitch McConnell could flip the Senate – so this is a campaign every Democrat needs to help. Because we can’t let McConnell take over. We just can’t. I wish I could say this will be an easy race, but the GOP is already doing whatever it takes to defend Rubio and attack Val: National Republicans just spent $10 million on on-the-ground organizers to stop Val and any other Democrat from winning in Florida ever again. The last Senate race in Florida was decided by a tiny margin, just 0.12 percent, that’s unheard of and extremely tight. Recent polls show this race is already in the margin of error. So what we do right now will make all the difference. That's why Val Demings needs your help to expand her grassroots campaign and reach every Floridian voter. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Val Demings has what it takes to win – let’s do our part. Thanks for chipping in and I hope you had a wonderful holiday, Adam Schiff | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. clean_body: Friend, All the Democrats want to do is put people in jail. They are vicious, violent, and Radical Left thugs. They are destroying people's lives, which is the only thing they are good at. They couldn't get out of Afghanistan without disgracing our Country. The economy and inflation are a disaster. They're letting thugs and murderers into our Country \- their DA 's, AG's, and Dem Law Enforcement are out of control. I've been trying to tell you, Friend this is what happens in communist countries and dictatorships. I'll never stop fighting to SAVE AMERICA, but I need to know you're in this fight with me. Will you give ONE MORE donation before the end of the year? SUPPORTER: CONTRIBUTION STATUS: PENDING DEADLINE:******TODAY I am calling on YOU to step up, Friend. When I look back on the Patriots who went above and beyond to SAVE AMERICA, I want to see YOUR name on the list. ** Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. body:
It may not be what you think. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s6CiOXcCLrjj4AZ6JQxJIduoipJ3LdlrKOtjI7BaUli8JzY66AJovcRXuUhZqGfpadd_ZtOcEn3dRA_ocK8rEl2SLQGGRT-1JChvunHqUESzEBNhhrZKn4bDrdv9_SfsOJPdriwixZxgNVcSC4BcjAWJ6w_jMtyKJvlc1u3DkDGWxNV_20YPs000lenKYdDL7UpprFY6bYxGzCN57Ojcq7X__ZKFWNLIzOUST0xgrc5NtpCzjsjN1ykrIpXJp7Pdnw/3i6/392DkBieR6yn0uaqCtYPMg/h0/MFs-xKQ0H-ydwoibqcq6Zzfrw-R4j2-lkjrcJ0CbPEk) Team, We tried to get a bit of rest over the holidays, and we hope you did too. This week, most campaigns will be consumed with end of year fundraising, but we are trying to remember what we are raising for: **In just a few weeks, we will start counting down to the deadline to file petitions to get on the ballot in IL-7. The most important deadline of our campaign.** Fundraising is important, but votes—not dollars decide elections. It's easy to forget that in an electoral system overwhelmed by corporate money. **So** **here is a behind the scenes look at some of the ways your donations fuel our people-powered campaign:**
* **Petition season** is coming up and we are determined to submit well over the required number of petitions. To do that we need to fundraise for staff, an office, literature, lawyer fees, and transportation. When we hit our goals, there will be no denying the scale of our movement to change IL-7. [Can you help us raise what we need?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfREmUDdh-5yEozwX5Lnb4hZ1Wws3LC6-4bM7K9yVZF7WkAwY557uiMSyZ8KHY_MXrrbnm00rAtKSB5Yf4H6dOYGDzxNnk-y4-clxsRsd3woVa898VZSV40p-OT_OSAsXqYXbo-J48uSiz7voxUA00X05jE3eu6erLb2mWVGbjMCNjkMEK68eGVnGbnx92cLCcCAPGBF8mmmnExjcMyaMn77pXZyl7ffwLS5Br_bqu03ZXnTRtD0DkN254UA8wlqfeltXWnBNhGXihAWq9rfblpHWgl_nzPSg9W-YG06q2gp8/3i6/392DkBieR6yn0uaqCtYPMg/h1/b-0CzauELPo7xQU8jLQCjf0BEbqmgyhCJW68TqlmA1c)
* **Name recognition** is one of the greatest obstacles the machine uses against us, but we know that when voters know there is an option they choose Kina over Danny Davis 75% of the time. In order to raise our name recognition we need to fundraise to gain media attention, speak to as many voters as possible, build strong networks online, and reach voters by mail. If we can do all that, change is going to come. [Will you join us?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfevbjuleJPqq5Rsmx-VmiJPlhNJf0HqYK4VADpM887zOpTk6yq7PT0wFsHiaUAQdX2FCXp-CUEl1gkGfl2VhIROFSJikp-C5_l1CrDBq1Cv0ykVNlj1piZEkWjXgc7KvQiZMsxYjZYngPfFs_UzkFezKMmLWXSsZywWyO8XWqfL767vtSSm4w8HboxbEVfg6XfetNpNYJ0SqBoK963crEpdr6-6yO1nxgzt2tE2hPHUXvZk3SNSqHOjZ6pfhT3zdxjRNVj-bWg4MDS6693h4mT2_SUqOHlQh8AuidFalhgXo/3i6/392DkBieR6yn0uaqCtYPMg/h2/2Xbg62sTK5TIegalSMIq40k1-c57e3z4hx_w550NhJI)
* **Political Endorsements** are something many voters are looking for in order to know our campaign is viable. Most political organizations need to see that a candidate has what it takes to really shake up the status quo. Being able to do things like out-raise our opponent 2 quarters in a row has opened a lot of eyes and ears to this race. [Help us keep it going!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0Otzfkuo3UnK447N4mGf5uctHiWSFOGiIj9WYZheb0B5pDpmprdRA2_f_3RogxAFwKvmkfd9gGKHaVnviT2axiKJn2HJyN6B-UAl2j38DBMtCGfsX_ttA6uhF3nZdIu-z-mYTfaffmMAiKBS_yDII5-Os-37X7cps8nCw7ZAKOt6rZXmBnDuxtNJC4zRAnqdY8W4wV2VhCHsWe96tebYdooSEm2VII6ZEaqZHZIe7vnIJ9T9DHulAhG5TzUZ_Pl02jaAUa9kak65TFd2wPjW05Swp-P9NzQYacpzE5S6025AxaMk/3i6/392DkBieR6yn0uaqCtYPMg/h3/SXqmd_hDKnxqmyp3Jo-sFXahRgb0uvj0y-tP-iXRcCM)

[****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfKaq7bSGkuyss2b-nlPiG60Mn72kEPt_lpvVmCRuH_PHDV5fCbWkxpaqu362Yyv0ItAEs1ymb8dfVBp4qK8e1psggqxl3U7LqUzdHe0Z6E7wJ6XdiEhaqqJQ0nuiEtJbIX6rLNbqSW9PSwh-_VKxawHlLKCy-mAoQyPlaiu6PA12xcBzsMOnmKtu2q9APca1KNd57AAUxwyLJh6BO2r_w36WOQp_8yKZRQZYc-G7kwRhpOSS9CjmEq7TeX7TyuBrkQ5z8KDuSYMSZptPOjHsLgEQcz_YttkdiF-dM328PEnI/3i6/392DkBieR6yn0uaqCtYPMg/h4/H0BAKHg0iedLRpBgrrrusmg9guA9aPVoiTGH9OJO2x8)**[**Now that you see what it is for, can you donate $15 to help us raise what we need to make it all happen?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfEm3LNmmHf__Mmgo2n77dqLrC-ASIxagtnRwI_fksxvuEJlhYIB8IHxGTBvN3f_7ZBHVr9qhnJhVY0fekZmgS6d-5ta71Kz-yBabh68iUZHZtWhE7KhpJZjAhfPhl30V1GBUSoCL4tDHhnx_HG0arYBRBU39ut-aoOOb9H4mpTHuF7UK6nMWEvkDrrhBiF1nZF-mspvS6k70hhLvfnmf3uLGRrcYumCRB6kpR5z_RNfvwqDzBHAvuoQ82SkzwvA0cmk8DQzQWF9ZQ6ita9LKNtJPE5VBJo9Pll3Ot31JBm0I/3i6/392DkBieR6yn0uaqCtYPMg/h5/G01IVY-YTQJMuZPDKBujErg_KIpzOVAoKIvY4Uqigak)** [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfdwlPOrfxkSJKdJ3BEH6dMAQOFqah69d_Dwig-7j4_QOaVIcDU9JirsSnS-U28wL5LhLfug9zhSLMGnLVFoTCNmLkNwKD7UHWL-VOgvtF-x2Q8CrLkmqZJDOsmXfQOWcmz67AslBb-7AHqbafI_cjgHQt_e2yUIb_BoZ5R8jqHwWGqrT87NyNX_kUH-oldEy11mt5AxHmqE1mfgkq21K7W0JT5af5wCE1Cu04ulFdcTjsqkof1neuOKz4zU7sP2IAgV8bnJsyG61kdMud8huxE5PkbC4dWGJBlOeWtdEFZyk/3i6/392DkBieR6yn0uaqCtYPMg/h6/xXvkbydMIL04wOdoRBGJOAgMds-ZE6reNvCQdsyI-ls) 2021 was just the beginning. Let's start 2022 strong so we can wield the full force of this campaign to take on the status quo and finally transform what true representation means in IL-7. clean_body: It may not be what you think. | | | Team, We tried to get a bit of rest over the holidays, and we hope you did too. This week, most campaigns will be consumed with end of year fundraising, but we are trying to remember what we are raising for: In just a few weeks, we will start counting down to the deadline to file petitions to get on the ballot in IL-7. The most important deadline of our campaign. Fundraising is important, but votes—not dollars decide elections. It's easy to forget that in an electoral system overwhelmed by corporate money. So here is a behind the scenes look at some of the ways your donations fuel our people-powered campaign: Petition season is coming up and we are determined to submit well over the required number of petitions. To do that we need to fundraise for staff, an office, literature, lawyer fees, and transportation. When we hit our goals, there will be no denying the scale of our movement to change IL-7. Name recognition is one of the greatest obstacles the machine uses against us, but we know that when voters know there is an option they choose Kina over Danny Davis 75% of the time. In order to raise our name recognition we need to fundraise to gain media attention, speak to as many voters as possible, build strong networks online, and reach voters by mail. If we can do all that, change is going to come. Political Endorsements are something many voters are looking for in order to know our campaign is viable. Most political organizations need to see that a candidate has what it takes to really shake up the status quo. Being able to do things like out-raise our opponent 2 quarters in a row has opened a lot of eyes and ears to this race. ** 2021 was just the beginning. Let's start 2022 strong so we can wield the full force of this campaign to take on the status quo and finally transform what true representation means in IL-7. In solidarity, Team Kina | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

We are only six days away from 2022. Six days away from our final FEC

Our FEC deadline is on December 31st and we can't afford to fall behind. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jessicaforwis/checking-in?e=42a933bda9)
---
| |
---
| Friends—

My team just informed that me we are behind where we were hoping to be at this point in the month to hit our contribution goal before our final FEC deadline of 2021.

**So I’m emailing today with an urgent request to see if we can make up the difference before midnight.**

The truth is, my campaign is powered by individual contributions from people like you — and it’s your support that keeps me focused on advancing our Democratic values in Washington and doing everything I can to expand our House majority.

All we need is 37 individual donations by midnight to close the gap in our fundraising, which is why I’m humbly asking:

#### **[Will you rush a contribution to our campaign today to help close the gap? name: Daniel Hernandez
subject: I’m running to protect the most competitive Arizona district — and my race is a top target for Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We simply can’t afford to lose this race, friend!
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4614?t=6&akid=1045%2E878179%2Eqisbp5) Friend, my name is Daniel Hernandez and I’m running for Congress.

I’m a Mexican-American, gay, millennial Arizonan running to keep the most competitive Arizona district BLUE!

When Rep. Gabby Giffords was shot, I was her college intern and helped save her life by administering first aid.

**Since then, I’ve spent my whole career in public service fighting for reproductive healthcare, LGBTQ+ rights, and an end to gun violence.** [I’m running for Congress to save this seat, but top National Republicans are vowing to fundraise MILLIONS to defeat me, and we simply can’t afford to fall behind. My campaign is far behind on our critical fundraising goals – if we miss this goal, we’ll be going into our 2022 congressional race BEHIND. Can I count on you to split $5 with my campaign and VPP to save our House majority? ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4615?t=7&akid=1045%2E878179%2Eqisbp5) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [$5,000 GOAL: CHIP IN $5 NOW TO KEEP ARIZONA’S MOST COMPETITIVE DISTRICT BLUE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4616?t=8&akid=1045%2E878179%2Eqisbp5)
---
**Friend, MAGA extremists have completely hijacked the Republican Party.**

If we allow far-right Republicans to win back the House majority, their fringe views will become the mainstream.

_We’ll lose objective truth, scientifically-backed legislation, a free democracy, fair elections, free press & speech, and so much more._

**Not to mention: Action on climate change, healthcare, student debt, and so much more will come to a COMPLETE stop.**

Friend, here in Arizona’s 6th district, we have a make-or-break opportunity to keep one critical district from flipping red and save Gabby Giffords’ hometown seat. If we lose, we’ll send another Trump devotee to Congress – and let Republicans take the House majority.

[Friend, let’s save our House majority. Please, split $5 NOW between my campaign and VPP to help WIN this crucial seat »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4615?t=9&akid=1045%2E878179%2Eqisbp5)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4617?t=10&akid=1045%2E878179%2Eqisbp5)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4618?t=11&akid=1045%2E878179%2Eqisbp5)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4619?t=12&akid=1045%2E878179%2Eqisbp5)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4614?t=13&akid=1045%2E878179%2Eqisbp5)
Thank you so much. I know we can do this!

_– Daniel Hernandez_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1045%2E878179%2Eqisbp5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1045%2E878179%2Eqisbp5).**

clean_body: We simply can’t afford to lose this race, friend! | Friend, my name is Daniel Hernandez and I’m running for Congress. I’m a Mexican-American, gay, millennial Arizonan running to keep the most competitive Arizona district BLUE! When Rep. Gabby Giffords was shot, I was her college intern and helped save her life by administering first aid. Since then, I’ve spent my whole career in public service fighting for reproductive healthcare, LGBTQ+ rights, and an end to gun violence. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Friend, MAGA extremists have completely hijacked the Republican Party. If we allow far-right Republicans to win back the House majority, their fringe views will become the mainstream. We’ll lose objective truth, scientifically-backed legislation, a free democracy, fair elections, free press & speech, and so much more. Not to mention: Action on climate change, healthcare, student debt, and so much more will come to a COMPLETE stop. Friend, here in Arizona’s 6th district, we have a make-or-break opportunity to keep one critical district from flipping red and save Gabby Giffords’ hometown seat. If we lose, we’ll send another Trump devotee to Congress – and let Republicans take the House majority. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you so much. body:
2021's final push

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40045219/322619823/285533349?refcode=EM_FR_211226eoq1_eoq_lbr_actives_6_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZkZmQ0OS05ODY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvhVk-tn1C3Zq_48sMkNGdTeNrFEwN-irIU-1phcC7Y=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40045220/322619824/285533349?refcode=EM_FR_211226eoq1_eoq_lbr_actives_6_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZkZmQ0OS05ODY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvhVk-tn1C3Zq_48sMkNGdTeNrFEwN-irIU-1phcC7Y=) I know it’s the middle of the holiday season, but I have to ask you to make a donation ahead of my crucial Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline -- **[if you don’t need any convincing, click here to rush your gift now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40045221/322619825/285533349?refcode=EM_FR_211226eoq1_eoq_lbr_actives_6_ng_na_l1&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZkZmQ0OS05ODY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvhVk-tn1C3Zq_48sMkNGdTeNrFEwN-irIU-1phcC7Y=)**

This deadline is so important. At the end of the year, my campaign has to report our fundraising numbers to the FEC. Those numbers are reported online and made public for anyone to see.

This means that Republicans in Washington who want nothing more than to win back the House and turn Joe Biden’s home state against him are going to see exactly how well-prepared we are for the 2022 election year.

**That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise another $8,000 by midnight on Friday. But if we come up short of our goal and report a low number, they’ll jump at the opportunity to pick up a seat.**

We can stop this from happening if we show our grassroots army is as strong as ever, and the best way to do that is through as many grassroots donors as possible stepping up and making a donation.

In a moment, I'm going to ask if you'll **[chip in your first contribution of $50, $25, or even just $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40041084/322596110/-209993060?refcode=em-122621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjQ0MzU3NC03MTY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D4DGbhs8Z7mEpwLRS90JqMocj2e4dHX668MLPensPR4=)** toward my final FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the year that hits on New Year's Eve. But first, let me explain why it's critically important, especially right now.

**California's redistricting commission just approved final maps. Say hello to the new boundaries for the 1st Congressional District:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40041085/322596111/-209993060?refcode=em-122621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjQ0MzU3NC03MTY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D4DGbhs8Z7mEpwLRS90JqMocj2e4dHX668MLPensPR4=)
**My team has been pouring over the map, running analytics, and the good news is that the share of voters who identify as Latino in our district has almost doubled from 12% to 20%.**

I'm confident that we can reach Latinos -- and all CA-01 voters for that matter -- with our positive message of economic opportunity and bringing new, family-sustaining jobs to our district. LaMalfa’s record on these issues falls completely flat. And for my future constituents who only speak Spanish -- _I happen to be fluent!_

Now that we have new lines, it's important that we meet the mark on our end-of-year goal to show the pundits and the press that we have what it takes to flip CA-01 to blue. We outraised LaMalfa last quarter, and I know we can do it again.

**[If you were waiting for the best time to make your first contribution to unseat LaMalfa, this is it! Please chip in $50, $25, or even just $5 before midnight to help us raise the $7,771 we need to keep up the pace and hit our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40041086/322596112/-209993060?refcode=em-122621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjQ0MzU3NC03MTY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D4DGbhs8Z7mEpwLRS90JqMocj2e4dHX668MLPensPR4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40041087/322596113/-209993060?refcode=em-122621-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjQ0MzU3NC03MTY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D4DGbhs8Z7mEpwLRS90JqMocj2e4dHX668MLPensPR4=)

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zceb0n5e44bb4nl94aa1ujnrod9c1u0rvp36b8mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0climeo72clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zp7upa9ce71gg9j92v8s8fd2dr5edffpo4m37vv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0climeo72clh2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zs101u19kpfi04rn162tappns979sdjsdbolnkro_rp22sh2s8i66ob0climeo72clh2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central
MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the persons or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed. Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service.
---

1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z44a6qhb6db4u00gpp00pcvm6khdbcj9sccefrs0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0climeo72clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: My Official Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I've officially made a decision about my plans for the upcoming election.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?35kgt--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35kgt-1qqtu-4qqlpo3/)
---

As one of our top supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made an official decision about my plans for the upcoming election:

**I started CAVPAC, and I'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022. I'm focusing all my efforts on pushing our America First conservatives to victory and defeating the radical Left.**

I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and hold the Democrats accountable for their many failures.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines hoping things get better, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35kgt-1qqtv-4qqlpo4/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35kgt-1qqtw-4qqlpo5/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35kgt-1qqtx-4qqlpo6/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35kgt-1qqty-4qqlpo7/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35kgt-1qqtz-4qqlpo8/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35kgt-1qqu0-4qqlpo5/ "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35kgt-1qqu1-4qqlpo6/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

name: =?utf-8?q?Melanie_D=E2=80=99Arrigo?=
subject: My Holiday Wish
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Friend,
I hope you were able to enjoy some quality time with loved ones this holiday season.
Personally, I enjoyed the family time — baking cookies with my kids, having some peppermint bark and watching a holiday movie marathon while sipping hot chocolate.

As we come to the end of another year, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you & tell you my holiday wish.

I hope you and your loved ones are safe and healthy as we campaign for what we believe this country can still be.
**Everything Team D’Arrigo has been able to accomplish this year is because of the hard work, support and dedication of folks like you.**
Since our campaign launched, we’ve been able to:
* Knock thousands of doors
* Receive contributions from over 3,000 individual donors
* Talk to tens of thousands of voters

And we’re just getting started. I can’t wait to keep up our momentum with you in the new year.

For now, let’s use this time to rest and get ready to come back in the new year fresh and ready to hit the ground running so we can win this race.
**Thank you so much for all of your support this year.**
Stay safe and healthy this holiday season.
– Melanie (and family!)

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40045415/322621577/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTIzNmU4Yy05ZjY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXWIDkPIarczUkAnXRASh8kZYnQur7cIrUGE-c_37AI=&emci=44efb230-9d66-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f5236e8c-9f66-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40045417/322621580/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTIzNmU4Yy05ZjY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXWIDkPIarczUkAnXRASh8kZYnQur7cIrUGE-c_37AI=&emci=44efb230-9d66-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f5236e8c-9f66-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
We’ll cut straight to it: [**We’re about to ask if you can make a donation to help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley before his first end-of-quarter FEC deadline at midnight on December 31st.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40045419/322621582/-42398318?refcode=em20211226pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTIzNmU4Yy05ZjY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXWIDkPIarczUkAnXRASh8kZYnQur7cIrUGE-c_37AI=)
But first, can you give us a minute to explain why this deadline in particular is so important?
After December 31st, federal law requires Mike’s campaign against Grassley to pull together a report of how much we’ve raised and how many people have donated. That report then becomes _public_.
Reporters and political pundits will dig into the report, and they’ll use the numbers they find to judge the size and the strength of our people-powered campaign. **But it’s not just reporters who will be scrutinizing our FEC report.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to be pouring over our numbers to see if Chuck Grassley is in as much danger as the latest polls show he is. The national Democratic party, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC), and other progressive and advocacy groups are going to be looking to see if there is enough grassroots support that they should start prioritizing Mike’s campaign and Iowa’s critical Senate race as well.
And this is the _last chance_ for grassroots donors like you to show Admiral Mike Franken that you are 100% in and behind him to help him defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue next November.
We’re about to be under a microscope like we’ve never been before, so we need a show of financial strength unlike any we’ve ever had.
That’s why we’ve set a huge goal: **Raising another $100,000 from grassroots donors before our first FEC deadline to show reporters, Mitch McConnell, his Republican Super PACs, and the entire Democratic establishment that we’re all-in to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.**
It’s a big goal, but that’s how important things are accomplished: By setting big goals and working together to hit them. **We’re so close to hitting this goal, and with your support now, we’ll be able to show everyone the strength of our campaign and help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley next November.**
Mike Franken isn’t taking money from corporate PACs or special interests like Chuck Grassley is. Instead, he’s building a people-powered campaign funded by grassroots donors like you. People from all over the country who read emails like this one and give what they can, when they can.
[**Please, if you are able to, will you click here right now and give whatever you can afford to before Mike’s first end-of-quarter FEC deadline at midnight December 31st to help him hit this huge goal and defeat Chuck Grassley? Every dollar you give now will go directly to Mike Franken’s campaign to turn Iowa blue and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40045421/322621584/-42398318?refcode=em20211226pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTIzNmU4Yy05ZjY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXWIDkPIarczUkAnXRASh8kZYnQur7cIrUGE-c_37AI=)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Go big or go home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Can our grassroots movement pull this off? I think yes.
#
Derek,
When Dr. Oz jumped into this race, his first self-funded TV ad buy was nearly $2 MILLION — and that was just days after he announced. It’s been obvious from the get-go that Oz thinks he can buy Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate seat.
Well, my team has a bold idea about how to prove him wrong...
Remember, when the ball drops on New Year’s Eve, our campaign will also hit a _huuuuuuge_ end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. We've faced deadlines before, but this might be our biggest yet — the final FEC deadline before election year, and our first FEC deadline with Oz funneling his millions into the race.
**There’s never been a more important time to call on the full strength of our grassroots movement and see just how big we can go. 🙏**
**[What do you say, Derek...Do you think we can raise a full $2 million in online donations before midnight on December 31? If you’re with me, click to chip in anything now and let’s show Dr. Oz that nothing can outmatch our people power →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38884?refcode=em20211226-3974&t=1&akid=3974%2E434096%2EBQzICA)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38884?refcode=em20211226-3974&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3974%2E434096%2EBQzICA)**
Look, this is about having the resources to beat a multi-millionaire celebrity in one of the country’s most competitive Senate races, where our Democratic majority is on the line.
If that sounds kinda dramatic.. that’s because it is! The stakes couldn’t be higher + our opponent’s got virtually unlimited money to spend.
What that means is that _everyone_ is going to look at our Q4 FEC report as soon as it goes live to see how we finished the year, and if we have what it takes to win now that Oz is basically flooding the PA airwaves.
Honestly, I’m kinda nervous setting such a huge goal... but at the same time, I know that our grassroots team is one of the strongest, like, ever. So I really think we can pull this off if everyone (including you, Derek) contributes whatever they can. 💪
**[Is there any chance you could make your first $5 donation to our campaign today? I’m asking you directly because we have less than a week to push our end-of-quarter online fundraising to $2 million, and I really hope you can help us finish 2021 as strong as possible.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38884?refcode=em20211226-3974&t=21&akid=3974%2E434096%2EBQzICA)**
Thank you *so* much for everything. Let’s do this!!!
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211226-3974-footer&t=22&refcode2=3974_434096_BQzICA&akid=3974%2E434096%2EBQzICA)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3974%2E434096%2EBQzICA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3974%2E434096%2EBQzICA)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Team – New Hampshire is shaping up to be one of the most competitive Senate races of 2022.
News outlets from _The Boston Globe_ to _CNN_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection. **Even Rachel Maddow is sounding the alarm, saying I've "...got a very tough reelection fight ahead."**
It's not hyperbole when I say that this race could be the tipping point for our Democratic Senate majority.
Mitch McConnell and dark money groups have spent over $7 million on attack ads in New Hampshire, and they’re working. A new poll shows me tied with a far-right Trump Republican.
This race will be an uphill battle, but I'm no stranger to tough fights. In 2016, I won my race by only 1,017 votes—that's 0.14 percent. I know that we can hold this seat and protect our vulnerable Senate majority, but without a surge of grassroots support, we’ll continue to be outspent.
**[Team, can you chip in $5 or more before our FEC deadline to win in New Hampshire and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40045595/322622019/-913685435?refcode=e20211226_mwh-maddow2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjFmNWE4NS05ZjY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e79jfECeie-GHJafxEuhmszVXM9GGo6O28b3LomH0x4=)**

Even Rachel Maddow is sounding the alarm, saying I've "...got a very tough reelection fight ahead." It's not hyperbole when I say that this race could be the tipping point for our Democratic Senate majority. Mitch McConnell and dark money groups have spent over $7 million on attack ads in New Hampshire, and they’re working. A new poll shows me tied with a far-right Trump Republican. This race will be an uphill battle, but I'm no stranger to tough fights. In 2016, I won my race by only 1,017 votes—that's 0.14 percent. I know that we can hold this seat and protect our vulnerable Senate majority, but without a surge of grassroots support, we’ll continue to be outspent. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = Thank you for your support. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: Donate to become a 2021 Founding Donor
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
This is our campaign’s biggest deadline yet...
#

Friends -
In five days, we close the books on our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year.
This is our campaign’s biggest deadline yet, so **we’ve set an ambitious goal of 10,000 individual contributions before midnight on 12/31.** That’s what it will take to demonstrate that this people-powered movement has what it takes to flip this seat.
**[If you want to turn North Carolina blue in 2022, please consider making a $3 donation today to help us reach our goal. This deadline is the last chance to say you were a 2021 Founding Donor for Cheri Beasley.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211226-1-a&refcode2=183.357359.skjSLP&t=1&akid=183%2E357359%2EskjSLP)**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211226-1-a&refcode2=183.357359.skjSLP&t=2&akid=183%2E357359%2EskjSLP)**
How we do at this deadline sets the tone for all of 2022.
After an FEC deadline like this one, we are required to report our numbers for everyone to see. Pundits and our opponents look at these numbers to gauge whether or not we can win and elect a real fighter and trailblazer to the U.S. Senate.
There are a lot of corporate special interests and dark money forces that want to stop us. They do not want Cheri in the Senate fighting for our families. So it’s our job to prove we’re ready for anything they throw our way.
**[Make a $3 donation to become a 2021 Founding Donor to our campaign and help us reach our 10,000 donation goal. Each donation before the FEC deadline sends a powerful message about our grassroots strength — and puts us one step closer to flipping North Carolina!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211226-1-a&refcode2=183.357359.skjSLP&t=3&akid=183%2E357359%2EskjSLP)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em211226-1-a&refcode2=183.357359.skjSLP&t=23&akid=183%2E357359%2EskjSLP)**

****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=20.22&refcode=em211226-1-a&refcode2=183.357359.skjSLP&t=24&akid=183%2E357359%2EskjSLP)**

****
| **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211226-1-a&refcode2=183.357359.skjSLP&t=25&akid=183%2E357359%2EskjSLP)**

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. I know there’s a lot going on right now, and I sincerely hope that you and your family had a lovely Christmas if you celebrate. I really appreciate you taking the time to read my email. I’m emailing you because my husband, Dr. Raul Ruiz, needs your help. When my husband first became an emergency room physician, he took an oath to do no harm. And I know that Raul ran for Congress for that very same reason. I see it every day in the way he’s fought for vulnerable Americans throughout this pandemic. | | | | | | | I know he hates to ask you for money, but the truth is, he can’t win reelection without your generous support. He needs your support to keep fighting to make this country a better place for us all. So can you do me a favor and chip in whatever you can afford to help my husband win? | | | | | | Sincerely, Monica Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. How would you rate President Biden's FIRST year in office? | | | | **URGENT ACTION REQUESTED: **
**WILL YOU COMPLETE DEMOCRATIC HQ 'S 2021 REPORT CARD FOR PRESIDENT BIDEN?**
****
[](https://links.e.dccc.)

As President Biden's FIRST year in office comes to an end, we need to know this grassroots team stands behind him.

**That 's why we're asking you to complete our Official Presidential Report Card before midnight.**

**QUICKLY: How would you rate President Biden 's FIRST year in office?**

We're calling for 46 responses from your area by 11:59 PM tonight.

We're SO proud of President Biden!

Since his inauguration nearly one year ago, he's done so much for the American people.

_**He helped PASS the**_ _**American Rescue Plan.**__**

He helped PASS a **__**historic investment in infrastructure.**__**

And he helped House Democrats PASS his **__**Build Back Better agenda.**_

We're so proud to see President Biden delivering for the American people -- but we know Trump's cronies will do and say anything to attack him.

And as his first year in office comes to an end, we need to know this grassroots team stands behind him.

**That 's why we're asking you to complete our Official Presidential Report Card before midnight.**

[**I will lead Ohio like a REAL conservative. **](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_Bq4gYwBBw4c0qa59VJVapULIn7AVvghG5rw910I7aGStfLOeGfHIxp2rQWLoaGEZhmlLKtJRVjKVZfnglw7ISqlqiIqiE6_QHtpOs4h5VbHQ9MRIbOC8iwvC5orlZVEESKvFa0rbOt4bIZpciHKjxE94wmSz16mNzBeilUEsV0yUdYnvf2W3liPsJD4SiYQEjSxkdc5IBJQ7TxPutVSwKyj_CR1B2NE2QoGO3suETR8bDvtRlDLTnFsO-gNkr-fTdbSPja1EPAWJm8XMH1rB7Chdd4GJz1MfyLWTNJMjwXJ--eF3gtx-XhCujUjCCT-gQMIdHy63dmZERf7RrgbjCMEdsBQ-9X7luZutokOOEe3KUq34GixHF_fhnJxZYIySWf0y8rRZ6zT4uTfw10j3ROh0eH0A21gnHo)

If you believe you pay too much in taxes, then please consider donating to my campaign today. Together we can make Ohio the envy of every business owner in the country.

Thank you,

Jim Renacci

clean_body: | = Friend, If you celebrated Christmas, I hope you had a nice time with family and friends. We sure did in the Smith Household! = It's back to work before our biggest fundraising deadline of the year Friday. Here are some quick updates on where things stand. It's important to me that you're in the loop: • I'm running against far-right Governor Kim Reynolds. Morning Consult ranked America's 9th least popular governor. • Earlier this year, she reported over a million dollars. She's taking checks from corporate executives to the tune of tens of thousands. • When push comes to shove, she'll side with corporate and special interests over working Iowans. She refused to intervene on behalf of striking workers at John Deere. • Friday marks the end of the year, which is also our biggest fundraising deadline yet. I need to put up the biggest number possible in order to show everyone that we have what it takes to defeat Kim Reynolds. body:
Last week I turned 96 years old. Here’s what I really want for my birthday: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40043220/322606903/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQ1ZTg1Yy04MDY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pyG86O8glaZt4hj3vOOgV9VVqlctFlOASSEDXbpos0M=) Hey friend, it’s Anne, or _Noonie_ as my grand and great grandchildren call me. I hope you’re enjoying the holidays.

Last week, our family got together to celebrate my 96th birthday.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40043221/322606904/102973118?refcode=em-12.26.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQ1ZTg1Yy04MDY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pyG86O8glaZt4hj3vOOgV9VVqlctFlOASSEDXbpos0M=)
_It’s my party and I’ll have pie if I want to._
For much of the 96 years of my life, my husband and I have been proud Republicans. But the past few years, I’ve learned that it's not about the party you support, but the candidate who is willing to fight for the issues that matter.

That’s why I'm so proud that my granddaughter is running for Congress. You may call it bias, but I call it grandmotherly wisdom. Cora is a passionate advocate for protecting our public lands, supporting our workers and unions, and defending our shared Montana values -- hard work, gratitude, and the importance of caring for one another.

**But right now, Cora needs your help:**

**[Can you contribute $3 to help Cora hit her end-of-year fundraising deadline? It would be the best belated birthday present a proud grandmother could ask for.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40043222/322606905/102973118?refcode=em-12.26.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQ1ZTg1Yy04MDY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pyG86O8glaZt4hj3vOOgV9VVqlctFlOASSEDXbpos0M=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40043223/322606906/102973118?refcode=em-12.26.21-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQ1ZTg1Yy04MDY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pyG86O8glaZt4hj3vOOgV9VVqlctFlOASSEDXbpos0M=)

Cora is a child of Montana through and through. She’s driven by her desire for true fairness and to change the system so it works for all of us, not just the very few at the top.

Cora’s grandfather was a Republican voter his entire life. I know that if he were still here today, he’d be knocking on doors, calling up voters, and saying exactly what I’m saying to you now.

**[Join me in contributing $3 to send Cora to Congress. Montana deserves a leader who will fight for us all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40043229/322606912/102973118?refcode=em-12.26.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQ1ZTg1Yy04MDY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pyG86O8glaZt4hj3vOOgV9VVqlctFlOASSEDXbpos0M=)**

Thank you, friend, and have a happy holiday!

Anne Cooper
Cora's Grandmother

But if we come up short, Democrats will NOT have the resources to make those crucial early investments and Mitch McConnell's chances of taking back the Senate will skyrocket.

**[Please, I'm personally counting on you. **Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District.** Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I am respectfully asking if you can please contribute $3 to Mark’s re-election before this FEC deadline comes to a close.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I am no stranger to close elections.
#

Friends —
I am no stranger to close elections.
In my first race for the Arizona State House, I won my primary by 445 votes. In my last race for the U.S. House of Representatives, I won by just over 1 percent of all ballots cast.
And in Mark’s coming re-election, I can tell you that it is going to be a very close race where every vote counts.
I also know that one of the hardest parts of any campaign is fundraising. But I am proud of the way Mark has raised money — from almost 1 million individual donors — a lot of them responding to emails like this one.
But Mark’s biggest challenge is right ahead of us: the final FEC fundraising deadline before the election year. And he really really needs your help. Because he cannot do it alone.
[**I am respectfully asking if you can please make a $3 contribution to Mark’s re-election campaign. Do it before his FEC fundraising deadline ends and he’s legally required to report his fundraising numbers.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211226-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1841_6688874_Q25bC0&akid=1841%2E6688874%2EQ25bC0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Gabby

Team —

No movement is made possible by one person. It takes a coalition of activists, leaders, and organizations to create lasting change.

Karen has the vision and the drive to make our city a place that puts the people first. That's why we're coming directly to you. Karen wants to know what your top priorities are for the city and what YOU would like for her to address as L.A.'s next mayor.

Surveys like this are one of the best ways Karen can hear directly from folks in the community. If you have an opinion about how Karen can fight on behalf of Angelenos, we want to hear it!

From Marcia, a single mom in Silver Lake, to Melvin, a small business owner in East L.A., and Patricia, a senior living in Beverly Grove — every single Angeleno deserves a seat at the table if we're going to address our city's biggest challenges. Surveys like this are one of the best ways Karen can hear directly from folks in the community. If you have an opinion about how Karen can fight on behalf of Angelenos, we want to hear it! ** Thank you, Team Bass Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. name: Rep. Demings
subject: here's my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Friend: This is a longer but especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.

I was raised in Jacksonville, FL – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.

That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.

I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.

Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.

Never tire, I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.

This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.

So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is resources. The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?refcode=jtk1994-fr-text

Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire.

Val Demings
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ibu2rS35CUKF9kop2dIjsg2] , or click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2668aeff-c15e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/1cb950d0-ac66-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2I5NTBkMC1hYzY2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RlJGSdt8xiS3loLHeTrAShucd5SVaLOZs7gLsORBuk0=&id=123159867 .
Val Demings for U.S. Senate
P. O. Box 536926
Orlando, FL 32853
United States
Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate

✅ Our MAGA opponent, _10-term entrenched incumbent Devin Nunes_ , announced he’s QUITTING Congress at the end of the month.

✅ **Phil announced his Special Election Campaign** to REPLACE Nunes and give our district the Democratic representation it deserves.

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to keep this open seat red with Devin Nunes stepping down. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. clean_body: So much has changed since we last reached out » | Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign! Message & data rates may apply. = Earlier this month, we came to you with our December Campaign Priorities Survey. But so much has changed since then, Peter! ✅ Our MAGA opponent, 10-term entrenched incumbent Devin Nunes , announced he’s QUITTING Congress at the end of the month. ✅ Phil announced his Special Election Campaign to REPLACE Nunes and give our district the Democratic representation it deserves. ❌ But we still never received your responses on our CRITICAL campaign survey?! | Look, Peter — This campaign is supported exclusively by grassroots Democrats like you. While our MAGA opponents line their pockets with dark money and avoid campaigning in the district, Phil is actually listening to the people. And while Phil tries to reach every voter he can on the campaign trail, it’s simply impossible to know what every single Democrat thinks! Thank you, Team Arballo | Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign! Message & data rates may apply. | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to keep this open seat red with Devin Nunes stepping down. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat them. body:
Our Republican leaders have failed us | | | Hey y, I’m Russell Ott — Representative for House District 93 in the South Carolina House of Representatives, and a proud supporter of Mia for SC. Serving alongside Mia in the General Assembly, I’ve had an up-close look at the failures of South Carolina’s Republican leadership. From refusing to take COVID-19 seriously despite losing over 14,000 South Carolinians, to leaving money on the table while our infrastructure floods and crumbles, our so-called “leaders” have failed us — **and it all starts at the top with Henry McMaster.** Mia is the only candidate who has the courage and the experience to take on McMaster and deliver real results for all of South Carolina’s communities. **[Winning won’t be easy, but anything is possible with a strong base of grassroots supporters who are ready for change. clean_body: Our Republican leaders have failed us | | | Hey y, I’m Russell Ott — Representative for House District 93 in the South Carolina House of Representatives, and a proud supporter of Mia for SC. Serving alongside Mia in the General Assembly, I’ve had an up-close look at the failures of South Carolina’s Republican leadership. From refusing to take COVID-19 seriously despite losing over 14,000 South Carolinians, to leaving money on the table while our infrastructure floods and crumbles, our so-called “leaders” have failed us — and it all starts at the top with Henry McMaster. Mia is the only candidate who has the courage and the experience to take on McMaster and deliver real results for all of South Carolina’s communities. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for anything you’re able to give. name: asking you to help Katie Porter
subject: Peter, moms for Katie needs your help urgently
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office
#teamkatie

And rather than slowing down during the holidays, Republicans decided to ramp up their attacks instead. _You may have even already seen the new attack ad. Republicans are villainizing me along with AOC and Ilhan Omar._ So, here's how we need to fight back: Our December end-of-quarter fundraising deadline will be the most important one I've had this entire year. We have to raise enough money to show we're still in this race and ready to win. If we don't, then we're in very bad shape. This is our last chance to stop the GOP from going all-out against me. If they see this next fundraising report and it's not where we need it to be, they're going to attack us even more in 2022 and I'm worried about what the next poll might show.
I'm telling you, if we lose this seat, there's no way we're going to keep the House majority.

clean_body: | | Peter, My team and I have been reaching out all year warning about the onslaught of GOP attack ads. And rather than slowing down during the holidays, Republicans decided to ramp up their attacks instead. You may have even already seen the new attack ad. Republicans are villainizing me along with AOC and Ilhan Omar. So, here's how we need to fight back: Our December end-of-quarter fundraising deadline will be the most important one I've had this entire year. We have to raise enough money to show we're still in this race and ready to win. If we don't, then we're in very bad shape. The best way you can help right now is to donate to our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | This is our last chance to stop the GOP from going all-out against me. If they see this next fundraising report and it's not where we need it to be, they're going to attack us even more in 2022 and I'm worried about what the next poll might show. I'm telling you, if we lose this seat, there's no way we're going to keep the House majority. I apologize for the urgent email, but I wanted to make sure I'm staying realistic with you all. I hope you'll consider giving. Always appreciative, Josh = =

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
2O,OOO RESPONSES NEEDED TO HIT MY GOAL: | | | | _**YOUR RESPONSE REQUESTED:**_

**WHO DID YOU VOTE FOR IN 2020?**

[](https://links.e.dccc.)
| [BIDEN ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [TRUMP ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/vWPEQ9Y7KVf_)
---|---|---

As 2021 comes to a close, Democratic HQ is working hard to ensure we have the critical data needed to win next year.

Up-to-date supporter data is CRITICAL in the fight to protect our Democratic House Majority, so we're coming to you with an urgent request:

**Will you update your Supporter Record and let us know who you voted for in 2020?**
[YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_) | | [UNSURE ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)
---|---|---
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
UNIQUE ID: #5907903
SUPPORTER STATUS: [**UNKNOWN >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs3jevqF-)

_We 're requesting 50,000 responses before 11:59pm. Please respond ASAP._
_****_

We're just DAYS away from the end of President Biden's first year in office.

And here at Democratic HQ, we're working hard to make sure we have the most accurate, up-to-date data possible heading into 2022.

**Please understand: If we want any hope of protecting our Democratic Trifecta from Trump 's Republicans, we need to know where supporters like you stand. **

But unfortunately, we're missing input from many on our grassroots team.

__**So we 're calling for 50,000 responses** _** - including 1,000 from your state - **_**to update their Supporter Record and let us know:** | [WHO DID YOU VOTE FOR IN 2020? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/9b46T4rNx0T-)
---
_
We know we ask a lot of you, but that 's because good data is so critical to our fight to protect House Democrats. Please, update your status now >>_
_****_
Thanks,

DCCC

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46162808&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0Mjk3MTYyOQS2&l=14289381&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority.
